pi_items.source: Task description refers to lead IT Security Administrator
O*NET Online confirms 15-1212.00 is Information Security Analysts
Task explicitly sets context in Crestwood University IT department
Task description explicitly lists these 4 exact usernames to be created
Task description specifies Department Hub Connection Config as the name to use

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated scenario at the fictional Crestwood University. It requires creating four specific users (cs.admin, math.admin, physics.supporter, it.supervisor) and one connection configuration (Department Hub Connection Config), as explicitly instructed in the task description. The role and SOC codes correctly map to O*NET 15-1212.00 for Information Security Analysts.
